description_long: This is a twisted, ring-shaped croissant with a golden-brown, slightly unevenly baked exterior. The surface displays a mix of lighter and darker brown tones, with some areas showing a deeper bake and subtle marbling. The pastry is thick and appears to have a dense, soft interior, with only faint hints of the classic croissant layering visible at the edges. The shape is more circular and twisted than the traditional crescent, resembling a rustic or artisanal style. There are no visible toppings or fillings on the surface, and the crust has a matte, slightly rough finish. The overall appearance suggests a hearty, hand-formed pastry suitable for a bakery or café setting.
description: A rustic, twisted ring-shaped croissant with a golden-brown, matte surface and subtle marbling. The pastry is thick, dense, and lacks visible toppings.
description_view_0: The croissant appears as a wide, twisted ring with a golden-brown crust and visible marbling along the surface.
description_view_1: From this angle, the croissant's thickness and the twisted, folded structure are more pronounced, with a clear view of the seam.
description_view_2: This side shows the continuous twist and the even, golden-brown bake, highlighting the ring shape.
description_view_3: The end of the croissant is visible, showing a rounded, slightly uneven closure and a denser, less layered appearance.
